title: theme — entitlements

entitlements.description: Master gate — enables the whole theme module. Master feature is available on every tier (baseline branded experience), but downstream sub-entitlements gate customisation depth.

Cap on the number of tenant-authored ThemePreset rows (excluding platform-provided presets). Small = pick from platform presets only; Medium = up to 5 custom presets; Enterprise = effectively unlimited (10k soft cap for pagination sanity).

Per-theme cap on ThemeTokenOverride rows. Small = presets are as-is (no per-token tweaks); Medium = 25 overrides per theme (typical brand-color-swap scope); Enterprise = effectively unlimited (10k soft cap).

Enables the ContrastAuditor binding — WCAG AA (4.5:1) + AAA (7:1) contrast ratio findings surfaced as ThemeAccessibilityRecommendationNotification. Informational only, never blocks writes. Available on every tier (accessibility is not a paywall).
Enables selecting mode='dark' on any Theme + activating dark presets. Available on every tier — dark mode is a baseline UX expectation.

Extends the theme-activation history retention from the default last-5 activations to last-20. Enterprise only — long-tail rollback is a compliance/support signal (revert to Q3 2025 branding for a legal review).

cross_references: ThemePresetObserver::creating checks theme_custom_presets when tenant_id != null.
PurgeExpiredThemeSnapshotsJob uses theme_rollback_extended to pick between last-5 vs last-20 retention.
The ContrastAuditor binding is unconditional but its findings are only surfaced when theme_accessibility_audit is true.
